questions: What is the patient's oxygen saturation (Spo2) percentage?
What is the patient's Peak Expiratory Flow Rate (PEFR) percentage of predicted or personal best?
What is the patient's respiratory rate (breaths/min)?
What is the patient's heart rate (beats/min)?
Is the patient able to complete sentences in one breath? (Yes/No)
Does the patient exhibit accessory muscle use? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a silent chest? (Yes/No)
